creator: justinjereza@gmail.com
text:
Error messages:

--->  Installing the new version via the port
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portinstall.88809.3 env make reinstall
** Fix the installation problem and try again.
--->  Skipping 'net/p5-IO-INET6' because a requisite port 'net/p5-Socket6' failed (specify -k to force)
[Updating the pkgdb <format:bdb_btree> in /var/db/pkg ... - 193 packages found (-0 +5) ..... done]
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! net/p5-Socket6        (install error)
        * net/p5-IO-INET6

Fix: 

# cd /usr/ports/net-mgmt/mrtg && make install
How-To-Repeat: # portinstall net-mgmt/mrtg
